ClassId.description: The ID of the class to which a substitute teacher needs to be assigned.

StaffId.description: The staff ID of the teacher to substitute.

OverrideConflicts.description: When `true`, overrides any conflicts in the schedule.

SendClientEmail.description: When `true`, sends the client an automatic email about the substitution, if the client has opted to receive email.

SendOriginalTeacherEmail.description: When `true`, sends the originally scheduled teacher an automatic email about the substitution.

SendSubstituteTeacherEmail.description: When `true`, sends the substituted teacher an automatic email about the substitution.
